title: GIN and BRIN Indexes
description: Implement Generalized Inverted Indexes (GIN) for efficient querying of full-text search and JSONB data types. Leverage Block Range Indexes (BRIN) to optimize query performance on large-scale time-series datasets.
objectives: Implement Generalized Inverted Indexes (GIN) for efficient querying of full-text search and JSONB data types.
Leverage Block Range Indexes (BRIN) to optimize query performance on large-scale time-series datasets.
